ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Name of the high school attended by the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* Name of the college attended by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "carries" INTEGER /* Number of times the player carried the ball */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  "longest_gain" INTEGER /* Longest gain by the player */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards by the player */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the performance metrics */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the player participated in */,
  "average_yards_per_carry" REAL /* Average yards gained per carry */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total number of touchdowns scored in the season */,
  "total_receptions" INTEGER /* Total number of receptions in the season */,
  "total_receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (Active/Completed) */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress towards achieving the goal (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_goals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player (if applicable) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach (if applicable) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (Player, Coach, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media share */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who shared the post */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game related to the share */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was shared */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform used for sharing */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_shares_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_shares_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the team */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the team */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties against the team */,
  "time_of_possession" TEXT /* Total time of possession by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g. concussion, sprain, etc.) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (Active/Recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
